changelog: PHASE 4: Enterprise Custodial Wallet Subsystem Live
NEW: Dedicated Deposit Screen (Network Selection, QR Code, Copy & Share Address)
NEW: Dedicated Withdraw Screen (Validation, Multi-step Confirmation, Network Selector)
NEW: Dedicated Transfer Screen (Recipient UID Lookup, Multi-token support)
NEW: Dedicated Transaction History Screen (Filterable by All, Deposit, Withdraw, Transfer)
NEW: Custodial Escrow Lock, Release, and Refund RPC Integration
NEW: Live Admin Wallet Dashboard at /wallet-admin (Audit Log, Risk Alerts, Escrow Management)
STABILITY: Fixed version update loop & improved overall Android compatibility
